description: Tools registered with OpenAI Realtime API for voice-controlled drone swarm. Maps to consolidated /api/* endpoints on the Swarm Manager.

tools.name: drone_command
tools.description: Execute a single-drone command: takeoff, land, hover, set_yaw, change_speed, change_altitude, return_home, emergency_stop, pause, resume.

tools.name: drone_move
tools.description: Move a drone: simple goto, named path, or custom waypoints.

tools.name: drone_query
tools.description: Get telemetry for one drone or all drones.

tools.name: drone_swarm
tools.description: Fan any command to all or a subset of drones.

tools.name: drone_formation
tools.description: Arrange drones into a formation or animate transitions.

tools.name: drone_search
tools.description: Search an area with single drone or swarm.

tools.name: drone_stop
tools.description: Stop drone activity (paths, transitions, or everything).

tools.name: ask_openclaw
tools.description: Delegate complex requests to the full AutoM8te AI agent (Claude Opus).
